title: eval_if/eval_elsif_else: replace mutual recursion with iterative loop
description: eval_if and eval_elsif_else are mutually recursive functions. This pattern requires a new stack frame per elsif clause and is harder to reason about than an iterative loop. Idiomatic Rust for this type of chain-walking is a loop that advances a slice pointer through the remaining forms, matching 'elsif'/'else' continuations. This also fixes the stack overflow risk from crate-sieve-form-3dr.2.
